customManagers.description: EXAMPLE - extension under test. Replace depNameTemplate / datasourceTemplate / registryUrlTemplate with your extension; the pdf-exporter values here are only an example (GitHub Packages Maven, which also hosts SNAPSHOTs - see the matching ignoreUnstable packageRule below). Tracks the version pinned as TC_EXTENSION_VERSION in the system-tests workflow.
Track the admin-utility extension version pinned in the system-tests workflow (JFrog Maven repo)
Track the test-data extension version pinned in the system-tests workflow (GitHub releases)
Track the Polarion Docker image pinned in the system-tests workflow (JFrog Docker registry; YYMM-N tag scheme)

packageRules.description: EXAMPLE - pairs with the extension-under-test manager above. If your extension publishes SNAPSHOTs to GitHub Packages Maven, keep this and set matchDepNames to your extension; otherwise remove it. The pdf-exporter depName here is only an example.

Merge the system-test version bumps straight from the branch without opening a PR (includes majors and SNAPSHOTs). Scoped to system-tests.yml so the inherited preset's custom.regex manager (e.g. python-sbb-polarion in pyproject.toml) keeps its normal flow
